Lawn care services in Guelph

Everything Yardex does, in one place — weekly essentials to seasonal projects, all no-contract, all done by the same local crew of 5.

Get a Free Quote Call or Text
The full lineup

One crew for the whole property

Most Guelph properties don’t need six different companies — they need one crew that shows up. Yardex covers the weekly essentials and the seasonal projects with the same team, the same standard, and one point of contact. Start with what you need today; add anything else with a text.

Services

Full-service residential lawn care

Most popular · from $27.50

Lawn Mowing

Weekly cuts at 3 inches with trimming and full blowdown, every visit.

Fertilizing & Overseeding

Slow-release feedings and overseeding for thick, weed-resistant turf.

Aeration & Overseeding

Core aeration to relieve compaction, paired with seed for density.

Spring Cleanup

Fall Cleanup

Mulching

Weed Control

Trimming & Edging

While you’re away

Vacation Yard Care

Mowing and watering kept up while you travel — no favours to ask.

See Pricing
Common questions

Quick answers

Can I combine services in one quote?

Absolutely — most clients do. Mowing plus fertilizer, cleanup plus mulching, whatever your property needs: one crew, one quote, one invoice.

Do any services require a contract?

None of them. Every Yardex service is no-contract with no cancellation fees — from a single mulch job to full-season weekly care.

How fast do quotes come back?

Within 24 hours, usually same-day. Send your address and what you need through the quote form, or call and text (519) 835-0774 directly.

What if I'm not sure which service I need?

Describe the problem — patchy lawn, weedy beds, overgrown edges — and we'll recommend the right fix honestly, including telling you if something isn't worth paying for.

See all frequently asked questions

Not sure where to start?

Tell us about your property and we’ll recommend the right services — honestly.

Get Your Free Quote

No contracts. No cancellation fees. We reply within 24 hours — usually much faster.

Yardex

Student-built lawn care in Guelph since 2020. A team of 5 with commercial equipment, 50 weekly lawns, and no contracts — ever.
